name: Restauracja Pod Złotym Lwem
description: Traditional Polish cuisine in an elegant setting, famous for its golden lion decor and hearty regional dishes.

name: Kuchnia Polska
description: Authentic Polish kitchen serving pierogi, bigos, and other classic dishes made with locally sourced ingredients.

name: Pizzeria Da Marco
description: Neapolitan-style pizzeria with wood-fired oven, offering fresh Italian flavors in the heart of Wrocław.

name: Sushi House
description: Fresh sushi and Japanese specialties prepared by experienced chefs, with a cozy waterfront atmosphere.

name: Bistro Francuskie
description: A charming French bistro offering croque-monsieurs, escargot, and a curated selection of wines.

name: Taj Mahal
description: Vibrant Indian restaurant known for aromatic curries, tandoori dishes, and freshly baked naan bread.

name: Burger King
description: Popular fast food chain offering flame-grilled burgers, fries, and milkshakes.

name: Kebab House
description: Authentic Turkish kebabs with fresh vegetables, homemade sauces, and warm pita bread.

name: Café Latte
description: Cozy cafe serving specialty coffee, pastries, and light lunch options in a relaxed atmosphere.

name: Steak House
description: Premium steakhouse featuring dry-aged beef, grilled to perfection with seasonal side dishes.
